landing.title: Empowering Communities through Saathi
landing.subtitle: Smart Resource Allocation for Social Impact
landing.adminDesc: Manage volunteers, track impact, and optimize resources.
landing.volunteerDesc: Find opportunities to help and track your contributions.
landing.citizenDesc: Report needs and access community support services.

admin.title: Manage platform operations
admin.subtitle: Admins can monitor all reports, volunteers, and system data here.
admin.quickHelpDesc: Use the chatbot bubble for help with operations, feature locations, or feature usage.

dashboard.title: Saathi Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time community needs and resource allocation overview.

portal.reportIssuesTitle: Report issues and ask the chatbot
portal.reportIssuesSubtitle: Citizens can submit community needs, capture location from the browser, and get AI help.
portal.reportNeedDesc: Use the form below to submit a community issue with photo and precise browser location.
portal.askChatbotDesc: Ask how to report, what happens next, or what category to choose.
portal.browserLocationDesc: The app can fetch city/locality from your browser location when you allow permission.
portal.whatsAppUpdatesDesc: Get real-time updates via WhatsApp. Enter your phone number to receive volunteer assignments and status updates.
portal.phoneNumberFormat: Format: 10-digit Indian number (with or without +91 prefix)
portal.whatsAppHint: 💬 Tap to open WhatsApp and send your message via Twilio
portal.becomeVolunteerDesc: If you want to help others too, create a volunteer profile from here and join the help network.
portal.reportCommunityNeedSubtitle: Collect data through various input methods for quick response.
portal.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the community need in detail...
portal.uploadPhotoDesc: Attach an image of the issue (max 2MB). OCR will auto-extract text.
portal.unstructuredDesc: Paste any unstructured message (like from WhatsApp or SMS) here. Our AI will automatically extract the location, issue type, and urgency.
portal.unstructuredPlaceholder: Example: Urgent health emergency in Malviya Nagar, New Delhi. A child has high fever and needs medical attention immediately.
portal.seeUrgentMatchesTitle: See urgent matches and communicate quickly
portal.seeUrgentMatchesSubtitle: Volunteers only see urgent reports within {{distance}} km of their registered location.
portal.noUrgentReports: No urgent reports found within {{distance}} km of your location right now.
portal.checkBackSoon: Check back soon or broaden your search radius.
portal.completeSetupDesc: To see reports near you, please register as a volunteer with your location.
portal.onceRegisteredDesc: Once registered, you'll see all urgent reports within {{distance}} km of your location.
portal.nearbyVolunteersDesc: Volunteers within {{distance}} km of your location.
portal.volunteerCommDesc: Use the WhatsApp chat box below to contact a citizen, coordinator, or another volunteer directly.
portal.directWhatsAppDesc: Contact citizens, coordinators, or other volunteers directly via WhatsApp. Enter their phone number and your message below.
portal.yourMessagePlaceholder: Type your message here... (e.g., Hi, I am available to help with a nearby community report)
portal.whatsAppWebHint: 💬 Message will open in WhatsApp Web - tap Send to confirm
portal.reviewVolunteersDesc: You can also review volunteers from the directory for support coordination.

auth.pickYourRole: Pick your staff role and continue.
auth.loginDesc: Login with your citizen username and password.
auth.signupDesc: Create your account with username and password.
auth.enterValidNumber: Enter a valid Indian mobile number, e.g. +919876543210 or 9876543210.
auth.enterPhoneNumber: Please enter a WhatsApp number to test.
auth.invalidIndianNumber: Enter a valid Indian mobile number, like +919876543210.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.passwordRequired: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.locationRequired: Location must be verified. Use 'Use My Current Location' or 'Enter Address'.
auth.imageSize: Image too large. Please use a file under 1MB.
auth.completeProfile: Complete your profile to get started

volunteer.name: Name
volunteer.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this volunteer?

report.imageSize: Image too large. Please use a file under 2MB.
report.recordingNotSupported: Speech recognition not supported in your browser

messages.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.passwordStrength: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

errors.networkError: Network connection error. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.

notifications.newReport: New report submitted in your area
